title: Form extension adding a control for a new table-extension field
instruction: Extend the standard Microsoft table CustGroup by adding one new field, ConHasNotes, backed by the standard NoYes enum. Then extend the standard form CustGroup with a form extension that adds a CheckBox control (bound to ConHasNotes on the CustGroup data source) as a child of the form's Grid control. Do NOT modify the base table or base form directly -- both must be genuine extensions (AxTableExtension + AxFormExtension). Both objects must build clean.
